_meta: Scene blueprint — read by animation_engine.py and frame_generator.py

dialogue.line: Well... make sure you stay hydrated. And if you have kidney issues, check with your doctor first. I'm powerful — use me responsibly!

frame.MrWilly_pose: standing right of frame, arms crossed, watching Xpel attentively, nodding slowly
frame.MrWilly_expression: listening carefully, approving nod, respect growing
frame.Xpel_pose: standing on table left of frame, both tiny arms raised in surrender/honesty gesture, being transparent
frame.Xpel_expression: honest, slightly nervous but confident, sweating slightly for comedic effect
frame.camera_angle: medium two-shot, camera settles on Xpel slightly

camera_motion.movement: slow drift toward Xpel, centering slightly more on the product
camera_motion.end: medium shot favoring Xpel with MrWilly visible on right

character_motion.MrWilly: slow approving nod, arms stay crossed, weight shift to one side, natural breathing
character_motion.Xpel: arms in honest surrender position, slight nervous sway left to right, no particles, no glow, no spinning
